input.context: Software update v2.4.1 patches three critical vulnerabilities: CVE-2024-1234 (authentication bypass), CVE-2024-5678 (SQL injection), and CVE-2024-9012 (XSS). Users on v2.3.x should upgrade immediately. Users on v2.2.x must first upgrade to v2.3 before applying this patch.
